company: CHEFS CULINAR West GmbH & Co. KG

evidence.velocity_vs_rigour_explanation: The JD emphasises correctness and governance with no velocity signals; 'ensuring data quality and governance' is the decisive phrase.
evidence.domain_risk: supplier to hospitality and catering sectors
evidence.domain_risk_explanation: CHEFS CULINAR is a foodservice/hospitality supplier; errors affect business decisions but the JD contains no explicit financial reporting, compliance, or regulatory language, so moderate applies.
evidence.data_team_maturity: developing high-performance dashboards and reports with Power BI; ETL/ELT processes for integrating various data sources
evidence.data_team_maturity_explanation: Named tools appear in responsibilities (Power BI dashboards, ETL/ELT, Microsoft Fabric preferred), indicating an existing data function being extended rather than built from scratch.
evidence.jd_authorship: Developing high-performance dashboards and reports with Power BI; familiarity with BI tools including Power BI and IBM Cognos Analytics; knowledge of modern data platforms, preferably Microsoft Fabric
evidence.jd_authorship_explanation: Some specific tools and platforms are named but responsibilities remain generic ('supporting business departments', 'ensuring data quality'), placing this as mixed rather than hiring_manager.
evidence.stakeholder_orientation: Supporting business departments with analytics requirements
evidence.stakeholder_orientation_explanation: The primary audience is internal business departments consuming analytics output; framing is internal_data with no commercial, product, or finance-specific language.
evidence.autonomy_level: supporting business departments with analytics requirements
evidence.autonomy_level_explanation: The role is framed around support and delivery ('supporting business departments') rather than setting direction or owning strategy, placing this firmly in execution.
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix: implementing and optimising ETL/ELT processes; developing dashboards and reports
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix_explanation: The dominant verb signal is optimising and extending existing processes and dashboards, not building from zero.
evidence.language_gate: Fluency in German and English required (Deutsch und Englisch)
evidence.ai_role_explanation: The JD contains no reference to AI coding tools, GenAI, or AI-consuming data infrastructure anywhere in responsibilities or requirements.
evidence.testing_framing: Du stellst Datenqualität, Performance und Governance (inkl. Berechtigungen) sicher
evidence.testing_framing_explanation: The candidate personally 'ensures' data quality, performance, and governance, an ownership action verb consistent with the responsibility framing.
evidence.loss_aversion_framing: Du stellst Datenqualität, Performance und Governance (inkl. Berechtigungen) sicher
evidence.loss_aversion_framing_explanation: Ensuring data quality and governance in a foodservice supply chain reflects operational reliability concerns secondary to the JD's overall delivery and dashboard-building focus, without compliance or regulatory language.
